markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review the CheckThat sales pipeline and refine the demo process.](https://fathom.video/share/PNyZCRt654fp3Rru7hcGtimR565EsmR7?tab=summary&timestamp=107.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Demo Strategy:** Focus on a single, sharp competitor example to create urgency and demonstrate immediate value, rather than a broad category overview.](https://fathom.video/share/PNyZCRt654fp3Rru7hcGtimR565EsmR7?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [**Lead Nurturing:** Create a shared Slack channel with qualified prospects post-demo, using a value-add (e.g., slides) as the incentive to join.](https://fathom.video/share/PNyZCRt654fp3Rru7hcGtimR565EsmR7?tab=summary&timestamp=335.0)
  - [**Pipeline Blockers:** The current lead-gen workflow is too strict, filtering out qualified sign-ups. The product also lacks a process for defining new competitor categories (e.g., "Web Scraping"), which is critical for demo prep.](https://fathom.video/share/PNyZCRt654fp3Rru7hcGtimR565EsmR7?tab=summary&timestamp=1060.0)
  - [**Outbound Plan:** Nigel will begin manual, targeted outreach using LinkedIn Sales Navigator, leveraging GrowthX resources (e.g., content, events) to secure demos.](https://fathom.video/share/PNyZCRt654fp3Rru7hcGtimR565EsmR7?tab=summary&timestamp=1776.0)

## Topics

### Demo Strategy & Process

  - [**Goal:** Create urgency by showing a prospect where a competitor is winning and they are not, providing a clear path to action.](https://fathom.video/share/PNyZCRt654fp3Rru7hcGtimR565EsmR7?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [**Process Guide:**](https://fathom.video/share/PNyZCRt654fp3Rru7hcGtimR565EsmR7?tab=summary&timestamp=242.0)
    1.  [**Prep:** Jesus creates the workspace, ensuring correct categories and competitors are loaded.](https://fathom.video/share/PNyZCRt654fp3Rru7hcGtimR565EsmR7?tab=summary&timestamp=242.0)
    2.  [**Prompts:** Jesus generates custom prompts using Cursor (a self-serve site is in development).](https://fathom.video/share/PNyZCRt654fp3Rru7hcGtimR565EsmR7?tab=summary&timestamp=262.0)
    3.  [**Demo:** Nigel drives, focusing on the single, sharp competitor example.](https://fathom.video/share/PNyZCRt654fp3Rru7hcGtimR565EsmR7?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
    4.  **Post-Demo:** For qualified leads, create a shared Slack channel.
          - [**Incentive:** Offer a value-add (e.g., slides) in the channel to drive adoption.](https://fathom.video/share/PNyZCRt654fp3Rru7hcGtimR565EsmR7?tab=summary&timestamp=354.0)
          - [**Rationale:** Slack enables unencumbered follow-up, unlike email.](https://fathom.video/share/PNyZCRt654fp3Rru7hcGtimR565EsmR7?tab=summary&timestamp=335.0)
  - [**Workspace Model:**](https://fathom.video/share/PNyZCRt654fp3Rru7hcGtimR565EsmR7?tab=summary&timestamp=428.0)
      - [**Decision:** Use a single workspace per client to centralize data and reduce post-sale setup.](https://fathom.video/share/PNyZCRt654fp3Rru7hcGtimR565EsmR7?tab=summary&timestamp=428.0)
      - [**Pricing:** Gate on total prompt count shared across workspaces, not per-workspace fees.](https://fathom.video/share/PNyZCRt654fp3Rru7hcGtimR565EsmR7?tab=summary&timestamp=911.0)

### Pipeline Review & Demo Prep

  - [**Music Spirit (Today):**](https://fathom.video/share/PNyZCRt654fp3Rru7hcGtimR565EsmR7?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)
      - [**Status:** Likely unqualified for the business tier.](https://fathom.video/share/PNyZCRt654fp3Rru7hcGtimR565EsmR7?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)
      - [**Action:** Nigel will take the call as practice, redirecting to the Pro plan if appropriate and gathering product feedback for Stevie.](https://fathom.video/share/PNyZCRt654fp3Rru7hcGtimR565EsmR7?tab=summary&timestamp=676.0)
  - [**Fair (This Week):**](https://fathom.video/share/PNyZCRt654fp3Rru7hcGtimR565EsmR7?tab=summary&timestamp=708.0)
      - [**Status:** High-potential lead from Jason's network.](https://fathom.video/share/PNyZCRt654fp3Rru7hcGtimR565EsmR7?tab=summary&timestamp=708.0)
      - [**Business:** Wholesale marketplace with two main user types: merchants (B2C-like) and brands (B2B).](https://fathom.video/share/PNyZCRt654fp3Rru7hcGtimR565EsmR7?tab=summary&timestamp=747.0)
      - [**Strategy:** Focus the demo on the merchant side, as it offers a larger, more relevant AI visibility opportunity.](https://fathom.video/share/PNyZCRt654fp3Rru7hcGtimR565EsmR7?tab=summary&timestamp=769.0)
      - [**Blocker:** "Wholesale Marketplace" is a new category. Jesus must sync with Saskia to define it and map competitors.](https://fathom.video/share/PNyZCRt654fp3Rru7hcGtimR565EsmR7?tab=summary&timestamp=966.0)
  - [**PuppyGraph (This Week):**](https://fathom.video/share/PNyZCRt654fp3Rru7hcGtimR565EsmR7?tab=summary&timestamp=1011.0)
      - [**Status:** Warm lead from the community.](https://fathom.video/share/PNyZCRt654fp3Rru7hcGtimR565EsmR7?tab=summary&timestamp=1011.0)
      - [**Action:** Jason will introduce; Nigel will drive the demo.](https://fathom.video/share/PNyZCRt654fp3Rru7hcGtimR565EsmR7?tab=summary&timestamp=2289.0)
  - [**Bardeen (Next Week):**](https://fathom.video/share/PNyZCRt654fp3Rru7hcGtimR565EsmR7?tab=summary&timestamp=1060.0)
      - [**Status:** Warm lead from Nigel's network.](https://fathom.video/share/PNyZCRt654fp3Rru7hcGtimR565EsmR7?tab=summary&timestamp=1060.0)
      - [**Business:** Pivoted to a web scraping tool.](https://fathom.video/share/PNyZCRt654fp3Rru7hcGtimR565EsmR7?tab=summary&timestamp=1070.0)
      - [**Blocker:** "Web Scraping" is a new category. Jesus must define it and map competitors.](https://fathom.video/share/PNyZCRt654fp3Rru7hcGtimR565EsmR7?tab=summary&timestamp=1060.0)
  - [**Viscus (Next Week):**](https://fathom.video/share/PNyZCRt654fp3Rru7hcGtimR565EsmR7?tab=summary&timestamp=1247.0)
      - [**Status:** Advisory firm for dental tech companies.](https://fathom.video/share/PNyZCRt654fp3Rru7hcGtimR565EsmR7?tab=summary&timestamp=1247.0)
      - [**Qualification:** Potentially qualified, but CheckThat is not designed for location-based services. The focus is B2B SaaS.](https://fathom.video/share/PNyZCRt654fp3Rru7hcGtimR565EsmR7?tab=summary&timestamp=1305.0)

### Lead Generation & Outbound Strategy

  - [**Current Performance:**](https://fathom.video/share/PNyZCRt654fp3Rru7hcGtimR565EsmR7?tab=summary&timestamp=1453.0)
      - [**Outreach:** 40 people contacted (Director+ level).](https://fathom.video/share/PNyZCRt654fp3Rru7hcGtimR565EsmR7?tab=summary&timestamp=1561.0)
      - [**Results:** Low demo volume, with recent bookings (Fair, Bardeen) coming from existing network connections, not cold outreach.](https://fathom.video/share/PNyZCRt654fp3Rru7hcGtimR565EsmR7?tab=summary&timestamp=1453.0)
  - [**Workflow Blocker:** The Clay enrichment workflow is too strict, filtering out qualified sign-ups. Jason will loosen the criteria.](https://fathom.video/share/PNyZCRt654fp3Rru7hcGtimR565EsmR7?tab=summary&timestamp=1718.0)
  - [**Outbound Plan (Nigel):**](https://fathom.video/share/PNyZCRt654fp3Rru7hcGtimR565EsmR7?tab=summary&timestamp=1776.0)
      - [**Tools:** LinkedIn Sales Navigator (purchase pending), Ordinal (for lead capture from posts).](https://fathom.video/share/PNyZCRt654fp3Rru7hcGtimR565EsmR7?tab=summary&timestamp=1796.0)
      - [**Process:** Start with manual outreach to identify effective patterns, then scale with Understory.](https://fathom.video/share/PNyZCRt654fp3Rru7hcGtimR565EsmR7?tab=summary&timestamp=1847.0)
      - [**Leverage GrowthX Assets:** Offer free resources (e.g., AEO workshop recordings) to secure demos.](https://fathom.video/share/PNyZCRt654fp3Rru7hcGtimR565EsmR7?tab=summary&timestamp=2053.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Nigel:**](https://fathom.video/share/PNyZCRt654fp3Rru7hcGtimR565EsmR7?tab=summary&timestamp=2242.0)
      - [Send the sales deck to Jason for input.](https://fathom.video/share/PNyZCRt654fp3Rru7hcGtimR565EsmR7?tab=summary&timestamp=175.0)
      - [Drive the Music Spirit and PuppyGraph demos.](https://fathom.video/share/PNyZCRt654fp3Rru7hcGtimR565EsmR7?tab=summary&timestamp=2289.0)
      - [Purchase LinkedIn Sales Navigator.](https://fathom.video/share/PNyZCRt654fp3Rru7hcGtimR565EsmR7?tab=summary&timestamp=1796.0)
      - [Begin manual, targeted outreach.](https://fathom.video/share/PNyZCRt654fp3Rru7hcGtimR565EsmR7?tab=summary&timestamp=1776.0)
  - [**Jesus:**](https://fathom.video/share/PNyZCRt654fp3Rru7hcGtimR565EsmR7?tab=summary&timestamp=587.0)
      - [Create workspaces for Fair, Bardeen, and Viscus.](https://fathom.video/share/PNyZCRt654fp3Rru7hcGtimR565EsmR7?tab=summary&timestamp=587.0)
      - [Sync with Saskia to define the "Wholesale Marketplace" and "Web Scraping" categories.](https://fathom.video/share/PNyZCRt654fp3Rru7hcGtimR565EsmR7?tab=summary&timestamp=966.0)
  - [**Jason:**](https://fathom.video/share/PNyZCRt654fp3Rru7hcGtimR565EsmR7?tab=summary&timestamp=1718.0)
      - [Loosen the criteria in the Clay enrichment workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/PNyZCRt654fp3Rru7hcGtimR565EsmR7?tab=summary&timestamp=1718.0)
      - [Create a playbook with Jesus for defining new competitor categories.](https://fathom.video/share/PNyZCRt654fp3Rru7hcGtimR565EsmR7?tab=summary&timestamp=1168.0)
